title: carduus arabicus subsp. cinereus
intro: Carduus arabicus subsp. cinereus, also known as the grey thistle, is a subspecies of Carduus arabicus, a plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Carduus arabicus subsp. cinereus include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate rheumatic symptoms. The herbal preparations of Carduus arabicus subsp. cinereus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
